transcript: My bedroom has a table, study table, a TV, some lights, a bed, some almirahs for the clothes and it has a window. We also have a piano in our room and I have green, blue, grey curtains, some pictures, a fan and a lot of miniature toys and some stuffed toys as well. and i also have a lot of books in my room and my almira has a lot of stickers on it as well currently my bed has a blue bed sheet and a very cute little chair to sit on it is pink in color
